name: Green Grassy Cow Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F with an adult's help.
2. Mix jello and hot water in a small bowl until jello is dissolved.
3. Add shredded coconut, stir, and set the mixture aside.
4. Beat butter and sugars together until creamy. Add eggs, milk, and vanilla; beat again.
5. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a small bowl.
6. Add this to the main bowl with the butter mixture and stir well.
7. Stir in oats, nuts, and currants.
8. Use a slotted spoon to separate shredded coconut from the gelatin mix and drain on paper towels.
9. Press the drained coconut onto another layer of paper towels.
10. Discard leftover jello.
11. Scoop tablespoon-sized portions of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them 1-2 inches apart.
12. Bake for 9-10 minutes until golden brown.
13. Allow patties to cool on the cookie sheet for 1 minute before transferring to a wire rack.
